message:
fix: always fetch on mount when cache data is from storage hydration (#7669)

The hasFreshData check added in #7653 skipped the initial fetch when
cached data appeared fresh. However, data hydrated from sessionStorage
starts with isRefreshing=true (indicating it needs validation), and
the check didn't account for this. As a result, merge functions and
progressive fetchers never ran on mount when sessionStorage had recent
data.

Add !state.isRefreshing to the condition so hydrated data always
triggers a real fetch, while data from a completed in-session fetch
(isRefreshing=false) correctly skips the redundant refetch.

Fixes #7666

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
